inputs.label: Core Sleep Duration (hours)
inputs.businessContext: The main sleep block duration in hours, usually 2-4 hours in polyphasic schedules.

inputs.label: Number of Naps
inputs.businessContext: Total number of short nap periods per day (typically 1-6).

inputs.label: Nap Duration (minutes)
inputs.businessContext: Length of each nap in minutes (common ranges: 15-25 min).

inputs.label: Sleep Goal (hours)
inputs.businessContext: Your desired total sleep target for comparison (standard is 7-9 hours).
